scripts.clean:results: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item './allure-results' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path './allure-results' -Force | Out-Null"
scripts.test: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test
scripts.test:smoke: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test -g "@smoke"
scripts.test:p0: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test -g "@P0"
scripts.test:p1: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test -g "@P1"
scripts.test:p2: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test -g "@P2"
scripts.test:headed: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:ui: chcp 65001>nul && npm run clean:results && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:report: chcp 65001>nul && npm run test && npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
